response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend credentials (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) but lacks the mandatory profile for this role. There is no meaningful recent C++ experience (only a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015), no Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server/Oracle exposure, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. The role explicitly requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus financial-services domain knowledge, neither of which is demonstrated.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software engineering with strong fundamentals and TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship
Brief but real C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling (LabWindows/CVI)
Excellent written communication, public speaking, and workshop delivery track record
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014–2015), far below the required 5–10 years
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL listed only generically alongside MongoDB/MySQL
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No financial services / fixed income domain
